10001.QuestDetail: Waking up in a strange inn, there is a letter from a mysterious girl on the table...

10092.QuestDetail: Partnered with Airona, let's explore the Seabreeze Festival together!

10009.QuestDetail: While investigating the Tales of the Plains with Airona, discovered the rumored Snow Knight...

10089.QuestDetail: The defeated monster dropped loot, open it with the gift from Tina.

10095.QuestDetail: Guided by the clue, together with the two girls, you continue to investigate the Void Engram.

10090.QuestDetail: Head to the cliff of the ruins, find clues about the Void Engram.

10088.QuestDetail: The man in black and the Void Engram have disappeared, and the Tales of the Plains are temporarily concluded. It's time to go to the Pioneer Bureau to claim your reward!

10003.QuestDetail: At the Bureau, you met Valeria, who became your guide. Register as an adventurer and set forth on an exciting new journey!

10087.QuestDetail: A new mysterious commission has appeared: search for the Snow Knight thief who stole a diary with Airona. Speaking of Snow Knight, you both think of a certain red-haired girl...

10097.QuestDetail: Tina indeed has clues about the Snow Knight thief. She takes you and Airona to a suspect's hiding alley. So far, the commission is going smoothly, but is that really the case?

10010.QuestDetail: The Man in Black who previously disappeared has reappeared! He is very interested in you and seems to be plotting something.

10099.QuestDetail: Tina, who was eroded by the Void Engram, is missing. Go find her with your companions.

10011.QuestDetail: The Man in Black appears once again, and at the same time, Tina falls into a deeper crisis...

10201.QuestDetail: After the fireworks festival ended, you returned to The Double-Faced Coin and unexpectedly received a mysterious gift...

10202.QuestDetail: Learned a hidden past. Someone's future and fate changed because of it.

10203.QuestName: [S1] A Day of a Great Detective
10203.QuestDetail: Head to the Artisan Guild to find the secrets of the Medal and the Void Engram.

10204.QuestDetail: The Void Engram outbreak is related to Hruga, but how did the Void Engram end up in the medal? Go with Olvera to the Artisan Guild to investigate.

10205.QuestDetail: The small medal led to a big event. Search with your companions for an organization hidden behind the scenes.

10206.QuestDetail: After the investigation concluded, return to Asterleeds with Airona and enjoy a moment of peace.

10207.QuestDetail: Is the person who destroyed important documents in Asterleeds also related to the Dark Mist Legion? Tina, who is pursuing the criminal, encounters an injured guard saved by a mysterious boy. Ask him what happened.

10208.QuestDetail: Is the person who destroyed important documents in Asterleeds also related to the Dark Mist Legion? Tina, who is pursuing the criminal, encounters an injured guard saved by a mysterious boy. Ask him what happened.

10209.QuestDetail: A boy from Byrnhald, met you at the seaside.

10210.QuestDetail: Tina and Tatta encountered trouble on their way back to Asterleeds and urgently need assistance.

10211.QuestDetail: Head to the second-floor archive room in Ocean Hill to find old stories about the Dark Mist Legion and Jayden.

10212.QuestDetail: After making preparations, leave the city with your companions.

10213.QuestDetail: Follow the clues left by Tina to find the road to the Towering Ruin.

10214.QuestDetail: Use the Imagine Seed at a critical moment. Past events hidden in memory will appear.

10215.QuestDetail: Search for Denvel's traces with your companions, heading to that fortress of silence and calamity.

10302.QuestDetail: That stubborn priest holds the key to dispelling the Void Engram. Discuss countermeasures with your companions.

10303.QuestDetail: There seems to be an anomaly among the Void Units. Investigate their situation carefully.

10304.QuestDetail: Go alone to Minsterhorn to investigate the lightning storm anomaly.

10307.QuestDetail: There seems to be a similar anomaly in the Forest of Monuments. Go assist Airona.

10308.QuestDetail: The forest ranger couple seems to be trapped at the center of the anomaly.....

10309.QuestDetail: Reunite with Tina and Tatta. At the right time, learn Tatta's secret...

10311.QuestName: [S1] The Paradox of Love and Hate
10311.QuestDetail: Before falling into a coma, Tatta confessed to you the past he had buried.

10312.QuestDetail: After meeting at the post station, Airona informs everyone of Denvel's true plot.

10313.QuestDetail: Accompany Tina to the Andra Tunnel to search for Engram, but encounter the trapped priest Stanley. He doesn't seem to have a friendly face towards you......

10401.QuestDetail: You and your companions arrive at the tribe of the aliens. Someone left a mysterious message, seemingly guiding you forward...

10403.QuestName: [S1] The Roar of Dragon and Wind
10403.QuestDetail: A sudden storm sweeps through the tribe, you and your companions go to investigate.

10404.QuestDetail: After collecting three keys, you finally arrive at the Forbidden Zone's gate. Behind the gate is the sacred relic of Kanamia, also the divine Legacy you have been pursuing for a long time.

10601.QuestName: [S2] Like Spring Unfolding Her First Rose
10601.QuestDetail: To retrieve the stolen Hruga's Horn, a new adventure begins, but the journey is never without its twists and turns—this time is no exception.

10602.QuestName: [S2] In the Moments After Those Dreams
10602.QuestDetail: Airona has fallen into a deep sleep. it's best to rest at a local's home and regain strength.

10603.QuestDetail: Parting ways with the warm-hearted Fafala, return to the journey of searching for the Hruga's Horn. This time, Airona has found new clues.

10604.QuestName: [S2] Knocking on Doors That Won't Open
10604.QuestDetail: The place where the so-called "Engram Anomaly" appears seems complicated, and it's hard to venture in recklessly as an adventurer.

10605.QuestName: [S2] Suddenly Done Well and Just Right
10605.QuestDetail: The guards at the Sislesa Mine are overly loyal. This path won't work, another way must be found.

10606.QuestName: [S2] The Leaking Bell Understood by Someone
10606.QuestDetail: A pickpocket daring enough to steal near the Pillar of Divinity must have extraordinary skills—at least her psychological quality far exceeds that of ordinary people. Even as a prisoner, she has not stopped "working hard."

10607.QuestName: [S2] The Night Steps Into the Long Street
10607.QuestDetail: Striking a deal with Darya, there's finally a way to enter the heavily guarded Sislesa Mine.

10608.QuestDetail: There were some minor incidents along the way, but successfully infiltrated the Sislesa Mine, and indeed, something is amiss here.

10609.QuestName: [S2] Stars Tremble and Fall Into the Dust
10609.QuestDetail: The Illusory Bloom's influence is far from trivial—the miners also suffer from it deeply. But unlike the pilgrims, they have no access to Starsoul Flasks. Treated unfairly, they close their hearts and won't easily trust outsiders.

10610.QuestDetail: The brutal actions of the Blackstone Legion are deeply infuriating, making it hard to stay calm and detached.

10611.QuestName: [S2] Burning Dreams of Fire in Dreams
10611.QuestDetail: Although the weak miners were rescued, Darya seems to be in low spirits.

10612.QuestName: [S2] There's a Lion Hidden in Her Eyes
10612.QuestDetail: Successfully escaped the mine, avoiding being blocked and surrounded by the Blackstone Legion. This is certainly good, but the investigation has not made progress yet, and more ideas are needed.

19003.QuestDetail: As the investigation deepened, arrived at the scene of the Knighting Ceremony...

19004.QuestDetail: As the investigation deepened, arrived at the scene of the Knighting Ceremony...

20001.QuestDetail: Defeat powerful monsters across the plains to unlock more Talent options.

20003.QuestDetail: Defeat the elite Goblin Crossbow hiding in Ancient City of Vill to further improve yourself.

20005.QuestDetail: Defeat the Void Arachnocrab hiding in the underground district to further improve yourself.

20007.QuestDetail: Defeat the Brigand Guard Captain in the Brigand camp to further improve yourself.

20009.QuestDetail: Defeat the Muku Warrior in the Muku Camp.

20040.QuestName: Grey is the Grey of Lies
20040.QuestDetail: It's detective time! Try to find clues about the contact person.

20041.QuestName: Red is the Red of Eagerness
20041.QuestDetail: You've obtained new clues from the spy Grey Crow, discuss the next steps with Tina.

20042.QuestDetail: Team up with your good partner Tina to uncover the spy's secrets!

20043.QuestName: Purple is the Purple of Melancholy
20043.QuestDetail: A little kid by the roadside called out to you. Listen to what he has to say...

30101.QuestName: The Whereabouts of the Council Candidate
30101.QuestDetail: The council candidate is missing? This is a big deal!

30102.QuestDetail: Griff's caravan and his valuable goods have disappeared, this is not a good sign.

30103.QuestDetail: Someone is buying contraband in Asterleeds market. Find out what's going on.

30104.QuestDetail: A father and daughter seem to be having a heated argument... Go see what's happening.

30105.QuestDetail: There is said to be a severe rat infestation in Port Town... But there seems to be something fishy about it. Try to uncover the truth.

30106.QuestDetail: Poor Bobby was beaten by his fellow scavengers. Try to stop the infighting among the scavengers.

30107.QuestDetail: Adventure and treasure hunting are a man's romance, but abandoning family for it is another matter.

30108.QuestDetail: Camille's grandmother was deceived by someone claiming to be a great witch. Help her out.

30109.QuestDetail:
During my exploration, I unexpectedly saved a scholar researching Ee-chan and Ee-chan who was looking for a partner.
At the scholar's request, I took on the task of assisting in finding Ee-chan's partner.

30110.QuestDetail: While passing through the goblin tribe, I met a father in distress. His son is suspected to have died in the war. Unable to accept it, he hopes to find a definite answer.

30111.QuestDetail: Sophie's sister ran up to the roof and disappeared. Wait, her sister is a cat? No wonder...

30112.QuestDetail: Aven's glasses are broken, and he is having a headache about how to repair the circuits.

30113.QuestDetail: The caravan was attacked by goblins again, protect the caravan through the difficulties.

30114.QuestDetail: Play an exciting game of hide and seek with the children of Minsterhorn!

31016.QuestDetail: Go to the Artisan Guild to learn about the Epic gear exchange service.

31063.QuestDetail: There seems to be new progress in the research on the ruins in Asterleeds.

31071.QuestDetail: Valeria received a strange letter, and the sender turned out to be Rab, the mascot of the Seabreeze Festival? To uncover the truth behind it, Valeria has entrusted you to help her investigate...

39002.QuestDetail: Find Douglas to complete a cargo delivery.

39003.QuestDetail: Let's take a look around the Guild together!

110001.QuestDetail: The seabreeze of Asterleeds passes through every street and alley, and through every free heart. The rhythmic melody resounds in the square. At this moment, why not put aside all worries and troubles, and let's swing freely!

500001.QuestDetail: The "Foxtail" restaurant has been open on the Food District of Asterleeds for 10 years. Except for the year during and after the Asterleeds Independence War, people could see Halva hanging the "Open" sign on the door every morning. Halva is the chef and owner of the "Foxtail" restaurant. He is a culinary master with a unique perspective and persistent pursuit of popular cuisine. Despite his age, his passion remains undiminished, and his skills have become even more refined. If you want to learn about Culinary, go ask him!

170005.QuestDetail: Valeria introduced you to three crucial matters for adventurers. First, let's listen to her detailed explanation about the commission quests from the Pioneer Bureau.

170006.QuestDetail: Complete the trial on the third level of the Trial Path!

10504.QuestDetail: To gather more information about Denvel, seek Tatta's help...

10505.QuestDetail: Head to the Artisan Guild and tell Airona everything. However, the Guild is under a new wave of attacks, defeat the monsters with your companions first.

10506.QuestDetail: Head to the Shrine and prepare to face Denvel.

10508.QuestDetail: The events have temporarily come to a halt, and Asterleeds has entered a period of recuperation. Talk to the people of this city.

20002.QuestName: Talent Training: Hazards of the Ancient City
20002.QuestDetail: Eliminate 50 goblins and embark on the path of training.

20004.QuestDetail: Eliminate 50 Arachnocrabs of any kind and continue on the path of training.

20006.QuestDetail: Eliminate 50 Brigands of any kind to further improve yourself.

20011.QuestDetail: Defeat the Great Warhog in Windhowl Canyon.

20012.QuestDetail: Eliminate 50 Bzzars in the underground district to continue your training journey.

20013.QuestDetail: Defeat the Void Bzzar in the underground district.

170110.QuestDetail: During their adventure journey, adventurers will encounter various tricky challenges. Mastering different Classes can help them deal with these troubles more easily!

30120.QuestDetail:
Join the parkour challenge with everyone and showcase your excellent parkour skills!
Location: "Parkour Registration Point" next to the "Unit X" Research Facility in Asterleeds
Opening Time: August 31, 19:00~20:00

30121.QuestDetail: A scholar stated that they are conducting a research project on the ecological recovery process after the Asterleeds Independence War.

30118.QuestDetail: Clement, the artisan responsible for repairing the streetlights, has vanished without a trace. Could it be related to the mysterious Legacy he discovered in the lamppost earlier? Assist Callisto in investigating the matter.

30125.QuestDetail: The candidate Eddie is preparing a speech for his campaign for councilor, but the speech was blown away by the wind when he went out. Head to Minsterhorn and help him retrieve these scattered manuscripts.

30137.QuestDetail: Several unfriendly-looking thugs are gathered at the door of a house, chatting about something and not allowing outsiders to approach. What are their intentions?

30141.QuestDetail: A fruit stall owner stated that they are facing malicious competition from a nearby fruit store and want to expand their business route, but it seems things are not that simple...

30122.QuestDetail: A generous noble lady is looking for her lost "treasure"...

30136.QuestDetail: A mysterious vendor inadvertently mentioned the term "The Shadow of Bapharian" and pointed out a location. What does it mean? Go and find out...

30123.QuestDetail: The young artisan Cian has found a box left behind by the former Guildmaster, Ted, and is desperate to open it. He believes it contains Ted's masterwork manuals. But is that really the case?

30131.QuestName: The Great Adventure! Wonder Cuisine Study Club
30131.QuestDetail: A diner claims to be a member of the "Wonder Cuisine Study Club" and can make uniquely flavored avant-garde dishes, but there is something odd about his words... Anyway, head to the plains and help him collect some materials.

30146.QuestDetail: Guard Ron made a big mistake and let the balloons for shooting practice fly away, which could lead to an accident...

30132.QuestDetail: Scout Scott hasn't replied to his mother Teresa for several days. Help this worried mother find out what's going on.

30126.QuestDetail: In the Asterleeds Defense Corps, the guards are eager to have a match with the adventurers.

30139.QuestDetail: After entering the Ruins of Andra City, Sandro's friend Grace went missing. Take Grace's dog Fido to find him.

30127.QuestDetail: Outside the Ruins of Andra City, a mysterious man seems to be digging the ground non-stop...

30138.QuestDetail: Gary lost his bag at the top of the giant tower, help him retrieve it.

186071.QuestName: Defeat the monster and protect Fido

186072.QuestName: Defeat the monster and protect Fido

30133.QuestName: The courage and patience of wild fishing
30133.QuestDetail:
"Do you know what's most important when fishing in the wild?"
Lure asked calmly with his eyes closed.
He held the fishing rod like a swordsman holding a sword that is his lifeline, without a trace of trembling in his hands...

30134.QuestDetail:
On the vast The Continent of Magna, treasures left by lost civilizations are buried...
At least, that's what the treasure map says.

30149.QuestDetail: The owner of The Double-Faced Coin has sent word through someone that an old acquaintance has a special request for you. Go to the agreed location on Entertainment District and check it out.

30150.QuestDetail: The heir of the "Mermaid," young Meller, has asked you to help collect overdue debts from old customers who haven't come to pay.

10801.QuestDetail: The actual control of the mine has quietly changed hands, and the whole story must be investigated as soon as possible.

30201.QuestDetail: A frightened scholar was found at the entrance of the Flower Valley. After talking, it was learned that he was researching "plants that emit fluorescence" with his companions in the valley. He got lost while searching for samples alone and was surrounded by monsters, thus trapped here.

10802.QuestName: [S2] Fully Awake But to No Avail
10802.QuestDetail: The Blackstone Legion is divided, and former loyalists are no longer trustworthy, while the truth is hidden in layers of fog.

10803.QuestDetail: The conspiracy finally reveals the tip of the iceberg, and in the power struggle, some still remain true to themselves. Go find those rebels.

10804.QuestDetail: It turns out the illegal mining of Crimson Marrow has existed for quite some time. What secrets lie behind this shadowy smuggling? And what upheaval will the Hruga's Horn​ bring to the Highlands?

10805.QuestName: [S2] Light Drops into the Deepest Part of My Eyes
10805.QuestDetail: Beyond tracing the origin of the Crimson Marrow, preventing this dangerous material from being smuggled out of the mine is equally crucial.

10806.QuestName: [S2] Walk Along the Wall of Non-poetry
10806.QuestDetail: The rebel leader tainted with Hruga's aura complicates matters further, and the miners' situation becomes more dangerous. The narrower the path, the more carefully it must be traversed.

10807.QuestDetail: After locating the leakage route of the Crimson Marrow, the final piece of the puzzle is finally in place. But upon returning to the underground mine, what awaits you is an empty sorting zone...

10808.QuestDetail: In turbulent times, the differences between people are magnified, but fortunately, Grieg unites miners of different positions and identities. However, reaching a consensus is just the beginning of action, not the end.

10809.QuestName: [S2] Black Stirs a Storm in the Eyes
10809.QuestDetail: Taking the first step to confront the Blackstone Legion, but it was unsuccessful, so they had to return to find Grieg and ask if there was an alternative plan.

10810.QuestDetail: The epic of heroes should not be built on the sacrifice of the innocent. To protect the miners of the Sislesa Mine, it is necessary to return to Asterleeds and request more forces to intervene.

10811.QuestDetail: For various considerations, Lamond does not want Asterleeds to openly confront the Duchy of Byrnhald. However, there is still a chance. Perhaps by changing the approach, the goal can still be achieved.

30203.QuestDetail: An elderly person from Jennifer's family has gone missing. Fortunately, they shouldn't have gone far. Ask around the neighborhood and bring the elderly person back home.

30204.QuestDetail: After accepting Jennifer's commission, I inquired with everyone who might know Roy's whereabouts. Finally, I found a clue from Valeria: Roy had once gone on a mission with a forest expedition team.

30209.QuestDetail: In the camp of Duskdye Woods , a hungry adventurer looks extremely tired...

30202.QuestDetail: Another scholar has requested to investigate the strange buzzing sound in the valley. According to his research, the monsters in the valley might be fighting for territory because of this buzzing sound.

30208.QuestDetail: While exploring the Everfall Forest, a torn diary page was discovered. The handwriting, still crisp and unweathered, revealed that someone had become lost in this place, desperately searching for a way home. Just then, the sharp barking of dogs echoed in the distance, hinting that something was unfolding nearby...

186102.QuestName: Defeat the Monster in front of You

186103.QuestName: Defeat the Monster in front of You

30210.QuestDetail: The archaeologist Hills from Byrnhaldt wanders around the Ruins of Andra City all day, as if searching for the time that has passed...

185009.QuestDetail: Intercept Abeku in the back alley

30205.QuestDetail: Finally learned from Bell about Roy's disappearance. Useful clues should be found within the exploration team's activity range at that time.

10510.QuestDetail: Everything will eventually settle. Head to Dark Mist Fortress and sever the chains of evil.

10511.QuestDetail: The Void Engram has engulfed Dark Mist Fortress. In the desperate moment, Tina unleashed the power of the Core of Stellarium. The light of Engram saved everyone. But a heavy price was paid...

30211.QuestDetail:
"Every beat of my pulse is proof of your existence."
The latest controversial work by a famous continental author!
A love waltz co-written by humans and dragons!

185510.QuestDetail: Help Jerrad and Asterleeds Defense Corps fend off the Dark Mist Legion's attack!

30212.QuestDetail: You received a mysterious card full of typos, inviting you to meet near the brewery in Port Town...

185515.QuestDetail: Go to the Pioneer Bureau to find Tatta, but an unexpected situation occurs on site...

185516.QuestDetail: Together with Tina, find Tatta outside the chaotic Pioneer Bureau. He brings clues to the last Void Sigil.

185520.QuestDetail: Discuss the next steps with your companions in the face of the threat from the last Void Sigil.

185525.QuestDetail: Go to the final battleground with your companions before everything becomes irreversible.

185526.QuestDetail: The moment of destiny is near. Destroy the last Void Sigil and stop Denvel's conspiracy.

185530.QuestDetail: The moment of destiny is near. Destroy the last Void Sigil and stop Denvel's conspiracy.

185505.QuestDetail: Talk to the girl who appeared in the village and try to use the Engram Collector to suppress the spread of the Void Sigil in Minsterhorn.

10513.QuestDetail: Asterleeds' adventure draws to a close, and hidden memories will guide you into the next journey.

10702.QuestDetail: Darya has returned to the mine. It's time to consider how to fulfill your promise to her. But acquiring a large number of Starsoul Flasks won't be easy. To achieve this goal, it's best to gather more information from the Pilgrims.

10703.QuestName: [S2] Noble Radiance of the Setting Sun
10703.QuestDetail: Go see First Priest Lothar and discuss support for the mine.

10704.QuestDetail: Now that you have the aid supplies, you can finally meet up with Airona. And Darya has also sent a letter explaining how to get back into the mine...

10705.QuestDetail: To accept Maire's commission, you must find out who exactly made the bad deal. But what is truly hidden behind this "bad deal"?

30300.QuestDetail: Assist the leader of the scholar group, Smith, in surveying the Legacies left by past civilizations in the ruins. Restore and reconstruct the deeply buried history in the Windhowl Canyon.

30314.QuestDetail: The scholar group's philologist Charlie is standing by a cliff, seemingly collecting some strange ancient texts...

30315.QuestDetail: The security captain of the Merchant Camp, Barry, seems very troubled. It is said that the camp has been targeted...

30401.QuestDetail: You received an unsigned letter inviting you to visit the shadow side of Asterleeds, the "Underground District."

30206.QuestDetail: Roy's disappearance seems to be related to a person named Ryan. Investigate around him.

30207.QuestDetail: Everything is ready, it's time to bring things to a close. Now, all that's left is to bring Swindler to justice!

170007.QuestDetail: Regnus is rich in natural resources, including plants, fungi, animals, minerals, and more. Some people, through experience and research, find and collect these natural resources in a reasonable manner, while others process the collected resources into various items useful for life and combat. This is what is known as a Life Skill.

30402.QuestName: Embark on the path to promotion?
30402.QuestDetail: Follow the guidance of the Hobos' leader and head to the connecting passage between Zone 1 and Zone 2 to find the contact person of the Floating Party.

186404.QuestName: Negotiate with the leader of the Floating Party

186405.QuestName: Act with the leader of the Floating Party

170008.QuestDetail: Sid is a renowned phytologist in Regnus. Almost every adventurer owns a copy of his book "The Magical Plants of Regnus." Whether it's for stopping external bleeding or pain relief and detoxification, if you've read his book, you can always find the corresponding plants in the wild. Go ask him about Botany.

170009.QuestDetail: The "Golden Spirit" prospecting team is the first prospecting team officially recognized by Asterleeds, mainly undertaking prospecting commissions from Asterleeds officials and the Pioneer Bureau. As the first leader of the prospecting team, Aile has retired from the front line and now stays in the city to teach young people who are just getting into prospecting. Be careful, he is very strict.

170010.QuestDetail: With the emergence of Gemology and Gemcrafting, members of the "Golden Spirit" Prospecting Team led by Safia concluded that clinging to traditional methods would result in stagnation. They departed to form the "Brilliant Crystals" Research Team. Safiya is likely the most knowledgeable person about crystals in all of Asterleeds. Speak with her to learn about Gemology.

170011.QuestDetail: The Artisan Guild claims that with the ancient relic "Orb Refining Device," they can create many items beneficial for adventuring. Go to the Artisan Guild to learn more.

170012.QuestDetail: The Artisan Guild intends to teach adventurers a technique for forging using Legacies. By processing metal ores, they can create materials that greatly aid in adventures. Go to the second floor of the Artisan Guild and ask Legacy expert Gary about it.

30320.QuestDetail: Head to Zone 3, complete the quest assigned by the Floating Party boss, and find the councilor.

170014.QuestDetail: The Imagine Research Institute has developed a new technique called "Alchemy." It is said that it can not only create various powerful potions but also many interesting tools. Go to the Imagine Research Institute to learn more.

186410.QuestName: Teach a lesson to the Robber Gang members

30404.QuestName: Dawn emerging from the core of the earth
30404.QuestDetail: Learn the truth from Wally and make a choice...

186412.QuestName: Defeat the combination of Scorpion and Dumb Hammer

30316.QuestName: The true and false ship spirit
30316.QuestDetail: Is there really a ship spirit on the Andra?

30319.QuestDetail: At the entrance of the Skimmer's Lair, a young man dressed as a scholar shivers as he looks at the area ahead

30501.QuestDetail: Traveler Uncle Zack has posted a commission, seemingly related to an underwater cave...

30502.QuestName: To the city where the seabreeze blows
30502.QuestDetail: In the depths of the underwater cave, a strange girl is waiting, seemingly in need of help.

30505.QuestName: Thousand Flowers Story - Cobalt Sea Lily
30505.QuestDetail:
With the discovery of the underwater cave, adventurers, scholars, merchants, fishermen, and others from Asterleeds flocked in, fearing they would miss the opportunity to change their lives if they were a step too late.
An area never before revealed to the world promises great rewards but also comes with great risks.
Botanist Sid feels somewhat troubled by this...

10012.QuestDetail: At dusk, you head to the beach for an appointment and join Airona for the fireworks festival. What kind of memories will you create on this night woven with stars and fireworks?

30410.QuestDetail: It seems that someone in the underground district needs to make a strengthening potion but is struggling to gather the materials. Go and check it out.

30408.QuestDetail: Erwin, the leader of the Artisan Guild energy team, is troubled and hopes someone can go to the sewers to see what is wrong with Asterleeds' energy network.

30411.QuestDetail: The eerie atmosphere of the sewers has attracted many curious individuals, including the Riddler... It is said that solving the Riddler's twisted riddles will yield generous rewards. Is it true?

170001.QuestDetail: There is a dividing line between adventurers of the same Class, and that is the choice of <style="emph-gn">Class paths</style>. Go ask Airona for her advice on this!

30409.QuestDetail: Food sources in the underground world have always been a major issue. A gang member, unable to bear the hunger, came up with the idea of raising Boarriers. However, he seems to have encountered some minor troubles...

31062.QuestDetail: They possess far greater Stamina and a myriad of attack methods compared to adventurers. Each one is the king of their own tribe, and they are called <style="emph-gn">bosses</style> by adventurers.

20014.QuestDetail: Eliminate 50 storm Goblins in Windhowl Canyon.

20015.QuestName: Talent Training: Storm at My Command
20015.QuestDetail: Defeat the Storm Goblin Warriors in Windhowl Canyon.

20016.QuestDetail: Eliminate 50 Shadow Scout and Radical Shadow Gunners on the outskirts of Ruins of Andra City.

20017.QuestDetail: Defeat the Shadow Captain on the outskirts of Ruins of Andra City ("It's almost over, I swear." - Airona)

20018.QuestName: Talent Training: Shadows in the Depths
20018.QuestDetail: Eliminate 50 Radical Shadow Wardens and Shadow Blade inside Ruins of Andra City to face the final test.

20019.QuestDetail:
Defeat the Shadow Commander inside Ruins of Andra City.
The end of training is the beginning of a new journey.

30506.QuestDetail: It is said that the Lamp Genie visits the Statue of the Hero every day, lighting the lamps beside the sculptures to guide the souls of heroes.

30151.QuestDetail: Pale Azure Lake is located in the northern part of Asteria Plains, near the Kanamia Forest. It is famous for its light blue water and abundant fish. After completing the project "Ecological Monitoring and Water Quality Survey of the Landing Battle Site," scholar Kaibo shifted his research focus to the ecological monitoring of Pale Azure Lake...

10300.QuestDetail: Returning to Asterleeds, you reunite with old friends and make a new promise.

30507.QuestDetail: Unexpectedly rescued a soldier in distress at the edge of the Statue of the Hero cliff. His purpose for being here is...

10402.QuestDetail: Following Rorola's lead, you arrive at the Wander Site of the Kanamian. The final key is hidden somewhere within the Wander Site.

30508.QuestDetail: Behind a tree near the Ancient City of Vill is hiding a young man, secretly watching the goblins in the distance.

30500.QuestDetail: A noisy group has arrived at the Pioneers' Guild. It seems there's a tricky problem waiting to be solved... What could it be?

30511.QuestName: To the Sea! Experimental Cuisine Club!
30511.QuestDetail: The opening of the Skimmer's Lair has attracted many groups to explore, including the Experimental Cuisine Club. But it seems they've run into some serious trouble...

170015.QuestDetail: Talk to Maxim from the Artisan Guild to learn about Reforge.

30517.QuestDetail: A young girl exploring the Skimmer's Lair claims she's in a bit of trouble and needs an adventurer. What's going on exactly?

170016.QuestDetail: Talk to Maxim from the Artisan Guild to learn about Gear Refinement.

30509.QuestDetail: Members of the Black Cat Tour Group have also arrived at the Skimmer's Lair to expand their tourism routes, but it looks like they've run into serious trouble...

170017.QuestDetail: Talk to Maxim from the Artisan Guild to learn about Embed.

186504.QuestName: Overcome the phantom and return to reality

30521.QuestDetail: I received a strange letter, inviting me to meet somewhere in the Skimmer's Lair... Should I go check it out?

30601.QuestDetail: The truth buried in Windhowl Canyon: the traitorous assistant Misty, the elusive poacher, the still-active divine relics among the ruins, and the seemingly protective machine... What is the real story?

30303.QuestDetail: Smith's apprentice, Esmeralda, is trying to investigate the ecological cycle in Windhowl Canyon. What exactly is causing the animals to riot?

30317.QuestDetail: Misty and Smith are discussing the location for the second campsite. Where should it be?

30703.QuestDetail: A group of Scavengers is recruiting adventurers to escort them to the mysterious "Duskdye Woods." Although the invitation is worded a bit oddly, it might be worth investigating.

30701.QuestName: A dead monster is a good monster
30701.QuestDetail: Nearby caravans have been repeatedly attacked by monsters. Investigations reveal that the local monsters are responsible. Join the guards to eliminate the monsters entrenched here.

30602.QuestDetail: Food has been repeatedly stolen from the Scavenger camp. Who is responsible?

30215.QuestDetail: The Everfall Forest, known for its perpetual rainfall, was once home to the Scavengers-until a rise in monster activity compelled them to abandon the camp they built with their own hands. Now, they are determined to reclaim their home - go and lend them a hand.

30702.QuestDetail: A young man has reportedly been seen held captive by Goblins. We should check it out.

186420.QuestName: The food-stealing Goblin has finally shown itself.

30216.QuestDetail: To protect this camp, the Scavengers must deal with the nearby monster infestations. Help Alex resolve this imminent threat.

30214.QuestDetail: Fiona says the water source in the camp is often polluted. The culprit turns out to be a cunning goblin. Figure something out.

30413.QuestName: The Dark Side of the Moon
30413.QuestDetail: A collector in the sewers seems urgently in need of someone to handle a rare underground ritual, a funeral.

30213.QuestDetail: A scholar needs help gathering materials for her research. Give her a hand.

30603.QuestDetail: Matthew at the Merchant Camp seems to be recruiting a capable adventurer, but he has some strange requirements. What could be the problem?

30604.QuestDetail: Three geology scholars from the Scholar Camp have been missing all day. Help find them.

30605.QuestDetail: In the Scholar Camp, apprentice Albert and his mentor Grayson are once again arguing about surveying the canyon ruins. Maybe you can help mediate.

30606.QuestDetail: Misty stole the letter opener. Albert couldn't complete his experimental project and felt upset. Grayson may have a way to reignite his motivation...

186423.QuestName: Assist Destinee in defeating the Golem

10901.QuestDetail: Jerrad has come to the Bahamar Highlands as an adventurer to help. But the silence in Lallipar seems somewhat unusual.

10902.QuestName: [S2] How Clouds Part to Reveal the Sun

10903.QuestDetail: The help Jerrad promised has finally arrived, and Miss Nida's struggles have been alleviated. Everything seems to be slowly getting back on track. At that moment, the Illusory Blooms erupt again.

10904.QuestDetail: The injured Hunter brings back terrible news: A giant Illusory Bloom has seemingly appeared in the highlands. If left unchecked, the Illusory Plague could engulf the entire highlands.

30704.QuestDetail: Several children have recently vanished in the Duskdye Woods . Search teams have come up empty-handed, and people are worried. But now, a man claiming to be a detective says he can find them...

30609.QuestDetail: A cry for help echoes in a narrow tunnel. What's going on?

30217.QuestDetail: Tristrom and Zek are arguing again. What's it about this time?

186122.QuestName: Pose as a Child to Be the Bait

30218.QuestDetail: Bad news has spread through the camp... What happened?

30607.QuestDetail: Zek is currently searching for individuals to locate the scavengers lost in the Everfall Forest. It's believed that these scavengers may be in grave danger and need to be found immediately. Lend a hand to Zek!

30152.QuestDetail: Near the entrance of the Skimmer's Lair, a young man appears to be injured.

170019.QuestDetail: Artisanry is an ancient skill passed down through generations. People design and process various types of wood into furniture and other items, building their dream homes piece by piece. Once, there was a renowned master carpenter in Asterleeds who led the post-war reconstruction. Perhaps due to his age or the toll of the demanding work, he passed away after getting the city through the toughest time. His adopted son, also his apprentice, took over his work. Go find Cicero to learn more about Artisanry.

170020.QuestDetail: Spin the wool of Caprahorns into yarn, extract plant pigments to make natural dyes, and weave dyed yarns into carpets with intricate patterns... Each beautiful carpet involves a complex process. If you want to learn more about weaving, go talk to Maina.

171009.QuestDetail: Connor's Quick Tips: A Novice Guide to Homestead Farming- 1. Purchase seeds: Seeds can be purchased from Homestead Merchant Delphine. 2. Plant the seeds: Approach the soil and sow your favorite seeds. Water the seeds you planted. 3. Harvest and profit: Once the crops are fully grown, harvest and sell them! Enjoy your peaceful farming time on the island!

32704.QuestDetail: The talkative miner is looking around everywhere, as if constantly ready to seize upon others' faults for his own gain.

Winterfest is now in full swing! Come claim today's Winterfest rewards!

50058.QuestDetail:

Find the four Meowlux Merchant Guild members in the Central District and answer their questions.
You'll receive the gift Deerlux has prepared after completing the challenge.
Active: During the Winterfest Gift event

50060.QuestDetail:
Take on Christo's challenge—jump from up high and burst the floating balloons as you descend!
Active: During the Winterfest Gift event

The great artist Violette is holding a winter sketching class for her three students, but she's missing a model to help demonstrate poses...
Active: During the Winterfest Gift event

50056.QuestDetail:
Elsa has prepared a fun mini-game for the Winterfest: She'll disguise herself as one of the surrounding festival decorations, and you must find her.
She's very confident she won't be discovered... but is that really true?
Try to see through her little trick!
Active: During the Winterfest Gift event

33505.QuestDetail: Bolin's seeds have finally sprouted, but there may still be a long way to go before they bloom successfully.

50061.QuestDetail:
Anna is searching for her pen pal, "Frozen Heart," and asks for your help to find the boy based on his features...
Active: During the Winterfest Gift event

50057.QuestDetail:
Elsa seems a bit dissatisfied with the last game.

She insists this time it's "absolutely impossible to fail."
Can you see through her transformation once more?
Active: During the Winterfest Gift event

33504.QuestName: Can You Come Plant Flowers Today, Too?
33504.QuestDetail: Bolin carefully tended to the plump seeds, but the results were not what he expected.

50055.QuestDetail:
During the quiet night before the Whimsical Winterfest, you unexpectedly meet Snoy, who is busy preparing for the celebration.
A lost gift and a moment of unexpected help spark your first encounter.
After exchanging gifts, Snoy asks you to gather the materials needed for the festival: Caprahorn Wool.
As night deepens, you two together are about to lift the curtain on Winterfest.
Active: During the Winterfest Gift event

50136.QuestDetail:
During the excitement of the Renewal Festival, there are always those with ill intentions trying to sneak in amidst the chaos...
Active during the Gifts of Renewal event

50123.QuestName: A Gift From the First Renewal Light

The Renewal Festival has begun! In the distant past, people welcomed the new year with the Renewal Light, a symbol of the changing of the years. Now, this tradition has returned as the first light of the festival. Come and claim this brilliant little gift to get the new year off to a wonderful start!
Active during the Gifts of Renewal event

33507.QuestDetail: Poor Dedrick still hasn't managed to collect the payment the squad owes him, but he persists in trying—knocking on the hundredth door that will most likely remain closed.

During the Renewal Festival, an eccentric visitor named Viano has appeared in Asterleeds. He observes the festivities from his peculiar point of view, making unique judgments. It is said that anyone who can disprove his strange conclusions will be able to take the gift he has prepared.
Active during the Gifts of Renewal event

33508.QuestDetail: A Nappo on the brink of death has appeared in a corner of the Transport Station.

50114.QuestDetail:

Active during the Gifts of Renewal event

50104.QuestDetail:
Lovers torn apart by deceit for three years finally face the truth together. Is forgiveness possible...? This is a thorny affair of the heart that you must hear out and help resolve!
Active during the Windborn Whispers event

33509.QuestDetail: The Nappo, Beebo, has suddenly disappeared, and the clerk is deeply worried.

Active during the Windborn Whispers event

33601.QuestDetail: There aren't many guests who dare to cause a scene at the Mustard Tavern, but they are not zero. It's time to make them pay a small price for their indulgence and lack of composure.

50141.QuestDetail:

Active during the Gifts of Renewal event

50137.QuestDetail:
The Renewal Festival is coming to a close. Talk to Sariia to look back on this time of bidding farewell to the old year and welcoming the new.
Active during the Gifts of Renewal event

33602.QuestDetail: Even in his drunken haze, Mathis hasn't forgotten that some people are still unhappy.

50142.QuestDetail:
Linne is collecting Renewal Dew, which can only be found during the festival. Head into the wilderness and gather any resource for a chance to obtain this rare material.
Active during the Gifts of Renewal event

30615.QuestDetail: The administrator is in desperate need of a way to wake himself up.

50122.QuestDetail:
The Time Guide has started giving out festival red envelopes! This is the first giveaway of the year. Choose a wish and write it down for the start of the new year.
Active during the Gifts of Renewal event

33603.QuestDetail: Although on duty at the Sentinel Tower, Varnell is clearly preoccupied with something other than his responsibilities.

33604.QuestDetail: After returning the letter breaking off the engagement to Aylen, he still intends to give it one last try.

50145.QuestName: Festival Red Envelope Giveaway: Second Wish
50145.QuestDetail:
The Time Guide has started giving out festival red envelopes! This is the second giveaway of the year. Each red envelope carries a unique wish for the year to come. Go get yours!
Active during the Gifts of Renewal event

33605.QuestDetail: The mail coach was attacked, and the packages destined for the Bekmar Transport Station were all looted. This is a true disaster...

50146.QuestDetail:

30616.QuestName: Two or Three Tips for Writing a Novel
30616.QuestDetail: If this manuscript finds its way back to its owner, perhaps it can become a complete story.

50120.QuestDetail:

Active during the Gifts of Renewal event

34201.QuestDetail: A merchant from Minsterhorn has appeared in Lallipar, and with him are three familiar children...

50133.QuestDetail:
The riddle host, Aleo, has designed a special quiz game. However, it seems that brainpower alone won't be enough for this riddle...
Active during the Gifts of Renewal event

30617.QuestDetail: Talk to the clerk in the mines.

50134.QuestDetail:
The lively Renewal Festival has brought everyone closer, but that's not always a good thing. In a corner of Asterleeds, Errwyn is trying to handle a delicate but real problem with social interactions...
Active during the Gifts of Renewal event

30618.QuestName: She Wrote Letters All Night Long
30618.QuestDetail: A rigid soldier stands, muttering to himself as he clutches a letter.

30619.QuestDetail: Serafina is in agony from a splitting headache and desperately needs help.

30620.QuestDetail: Serafina is plagued by sleepless nights.

33401.QuestDetail: Anemone once had a clash with Eira, a resident of Lallipar Village. She has deeply regretted it ever since, but can't bring herself to apologize.

33402.QuestDetail: Feliz, who loves ghost stories, got into a dispute with the other pilgrims. They mocked Feliz for being all talk, claiming he didn't actually have the courage for a real adventure. To prove himself, Feliz has decided to spend a night in the Lallipar Cemetery.

33403.QuestDetail: After discovering that the count of relief supplies is off, Nida, with your encouragement, decides to find out what's really going on.

186202.QuestName: Keep an Eye on the Relief Tent

32515.QuestDetail: Two free souls shall not lose their freedom for the sake of love...

30621.QuestName: A Warm Stew: A Traveler's Dream
30621.QuestDetail: The young woman lies by the roadside, perfectly still.

35401.QuestDetail:
"A professional author can't stay cooped up at their desk forever! Getting out for research is an essential part of creation!"
"And so?"
"So please, just give me a few more days' extension! Please? Just a few days is all I ask! I'll do anything!"

30622.QuestName: You Don't Need to Dress Up for Anyone
30622.QuestDetail: Gracie is sitting by the side of the road, looking utterly dejected.

30623.QuestDetail: You can always find a kindly old woman sitting under the large tree in the center of Lallipar.

30625.QuestDetail:
People tend to associate the color of one's attire with their personality. Red suggests passion and an outgoing nature; blue, rationality and composure; green, a gentle and friendly spirit; and purple, an air of mystery and elegance...
In a way, there's truth to this. It's unlikely you'll find an introvert dressed in vivid hues.
On the other hand, being defined by such color-based labels can be tremendously limiting.
For every person is not a single shade, but a kaleidoscope of colors.

30624.QuestDetail: Every Astral Stone Mound is a crystallization of regret for those who cannot return home, bearing the profound longing of the living...

34501.QuestDetail:
Perhaps everyone has dreamed of unforgettable adventures with their companions, of becoming a great hero revered by all—
But who's to say that what happens in a game isn't real? We have truly fought a great dragon together, and we have quarreled in the face of failure.
We have left our footprints in every corner of the continent, exploring lands where none have trod before.
Come on! Come and enjoy a thrilling game of Dragons & Mines with your friends!

34502.QuestName: Stones Don't Speak, So Please Be Silent
34502.QuestDetail:
"Could you please stop talking to the stones? It's disrupting my work."
"How dull, Walson. We spend all our days with these stones. Shouldn't we cultivate a bond with them?
"Senior, no matter how much you talk, the stones won't respond. And by the way, I have no intention of responding either."
"Well! What a disrespectful junior! No matter. Sooner or later, you'll be moved by my words, just as these stones will be.
"Alas."

30626.QuestDetail: Upon learning you're headed to the Bahamar Highlands, Sid the botanist has entrusted you with visiting a friend he made while journeying across the continent...

186427.QuestName: Chat with the people in the Mining Zone

185609.QuestDetail: Escort the thief to the location of the Creed Guard.

30627.QuestDetail: A letter severing a friendship was found.

33404.QuestDetail: Fafala stares at a small dog, thoroughly perplexed...

30628.QuestDetail: It's been some time since I've last seen Serafina.

30629.QuestDetail: Aubrey is terribly worried about his Caprahorn.

185610.QuestDetail: Gather information near the Pillar of Divinity

30002.QuestDetail: Following the battle at Dark Mist Fortress, Tatta retreated with the Dark Mist Legion to Byrnhald. Yet, Denvel's personal guard vanished without a trace. Though Olvera sent many Defense Corps soldiers in search of them, no news of their fate has ever surfaced...

30631.QuestDetail: The Moonshadow Wilds are situated north of the Bahamar Highlands. Each time night falls and the bright moon hangs high in the sky, the king of the Moonshadow Wilds begins its patrol of the territory...

30632.QuestDetail:
"Master, there seems to be something outside the tent."
"Something outside! Something!"
"I heard it. There's no need to repeat it so many times."
"But that wasn't me talking. "

30633.QuestDetail:
"Young one, why is it that we fish?"
Lure asks with a placid smile, betraying none of the frustration from when a fish slipped his hook moments before.
"Because the fish are there."

30634.QuestDetail:
"Ah, a customer with a discerning eye! This is the finest quality Caprahorn's Horn, straight from Lallipar. We paid a handsome sum to acquire it."
"You wanna know what this is for? Oh, well... Have you seen the staff that the Lizardman King carries?
"That's right! That's right! That very staff is made from a Caprahorn's Horn, just one of a higher quality and larger size.
"I'm not lying. The Caprahorn's Horn is a fine conductor of energy. You can even grind it into a powder to ingest, or apply it to your face for a skin-whitening effect.
"Thank you for your purchase! Do come again, dear customer! "

30635.QuestDetail:
Academic work is like peeling a cabbage. You struggle to peel away the layers, only to find it's hollow at the core. So, I ask you, is the Bapharian Legacy also nothing more than a cabbage?
"I have had enough of the Pioneer Bureau's restrictions on the Legacy! From this day forward, the Cabbage Mission is founded! Our objective is to seize total control of Bapharian technology and usher in a new world order!"

320025.QuestDetail: More of the story is yet to come...

30636.QuestDetail:
"What was the Pioneer Bureau's response?"
"They rejected our proposal for cooperation, stating they would never sink to the level of criminals such as us."
"Is that so? Since when has the Pioneer Bureau become such a bastion of justice?"
"What shall we do now, Consultant?"
"Please ask Mr. Hawkes to come here. Tell him the plan is about to commence."

30801.QuestDetail: The water of the Fallen River has lately surged in popularity, giving some people the idea of selling it.

170200.QuestDetail: A familiar figure bustles beneath the Pillar of Divinity—Mael, the Legacy artisan. His appearance is no accident. It likely signifies new progress in the research of the "Deep-Slumber Psychoscope."

105611.QuestDetail: Follow Darya's lead and investigate the situation in the mine with Airona.

105612.QuestDetail: Follow Darya's lead and investigate the situation in the mine with Airona.

20021.QuestDetail: Adrian, the Priest beneath the Pillar of Divinity, seems troubled by the Cabbage Mission... You might as well ask him what's the matter.

30003.QuestDetail: As the aboriginals of the underground world, the Bahamar Lizards have inhabited these lands for untold ages, long before the mines were ever constructed. They have become a familiar sight to the people of the highlands. Yet, for the Bapharian Creed and adventurers alike, this species, bearing physical traits so similar to dragons, must always be regarded with vigilance.

30004.QuestDetail: The Bluespine Lizard is a mutated strain of the highland colossi, possessing greater strength, a sturdier build, and far superior agility. If the theory of a shared origin between dragons and lizards holds true, then the Bluespine Lizard is far closer to dragonkind than ordinary specimens.

39106.QuestDetail:
The Vision-Sharing Society is introducing a philanthropic initiative, "Project Traveler," which aims to grant a true "journey of the soul" to those who, for various reasons, cannot set foot on the Bahamar Highlands themselves.
As a "Guide," I simply need to put on the Society's specially crafted Legacy glasses. As I explore the highlands, my vision is shared with a distant "Traveler," guiding them through the region's unique vistas and helping them realize a long-held dream.
The Society hails this project as a "revolutionary journey" and promises handsome rewards for its Guides.

30802.QuestDetail: The Purchaser hasn't been seen for days, and Belleet is getting worried. Meanwhile, a scholar studying the Augurus Ruins seems to have run into some trouble recently.

20022.QuestDetail:
There is an issue that has been troubling the leader of the Hunter Camp.
He doesn't think he can solve it alone.
He's anxiously looking for help, so go lend him a hand.

30803.QuestDetail: Amoura asks you to retrieve the fox pelts Aldous borrowed. Winter is approaching, and everyone's supplies are running low. She needs to sell her game to buy food for storage and can no longer afford to be generous. But since they're all members of the camp, it's awkward for her to do this personally, so she's asking for your help...

30637.QuestDetail:
Adrian recently fell off a cliff while hunting. As an old man, he needs time to recover.
Unable to leave the camp, he's worried that the hunting traps he's in charge of will be unattended, which could hurt the camp's hunting results...

30005.QuestDetail:
Alp had a friend who was taken away by his parents and left the Hunter Camp together with Alfonso.
Alp doesn't know how to see his friend again, and he's sulking at the edge of the camp...

30804.QuestDetail: Alexia is the daughter of Hunter Kiana. She looks nervous and unsettled, as if something is weighing on her...

20023.QuestDetail: The kids are all friends. When Nyomi learned that Alp went alone into the forest to find Muhammad, this usually quiet girl got angry. She asks you to deliver a letter to Muhammad to tattle on him and put an end to such dangerous behavior...

50020.QuestDetail:
Shatter the dream and face the final trial of the illusion! During the event period, conquer Master Dungeons and accumulate 1,800 points to complete the trial!
Active during Master's Trial: Dream Resonance

50030.QuestDetail: Go to the Dreambloom Ruins and defeat Solarshine the Caprahorn King and Lunalusion the Caprahorn Kingrebel at any difficulty!

50021.QuestDetail:
Shatter the dream and face the final trial of the illusion! During the event period, conquer Master Dungeons and accumulate 1,900 points to complete the trial!
Active during Master's Trial: Dream Resonance

50031.QuestDetail: Go to the Dreambloom Ruins and defeat the Withered Bloomshard at any difficulty!

50022.QuestDetail:
Shatter the dream and face the final trial of the illusion! During the event period, conquer Master Dungeons and accumulate 2,000 points to complete the trial!
Active during Master's Trial: Dream Resonance

50033.QuestDetail: Illusory Blooms have eroded the ruins, causing unpredictable anomalies...

50032.QuestDetail: Go to the Dreambloom Ruins and defeat the Erosion Bloom Afterimage at any difficulty!

30638.QuestDetail:
"Adventurer? When I was young, I dreamed of becoming an adventurer, leaving Asterleeds to explore ruins and marvels across the continent."
"But under the oppression of Byrnhald, I had to stay. Asterleeds needed me, and so did the merchant guild."
"Now that I'm here, my children no longer need to sacrifice their dreams. I won't tell your sisters about this, but when you're out there, remember to use your head and think before acting."
"You're the child of Carnevor, the councilor and great merchant. That identity brings not only benefits but also danger."
"I'll write a letter to the Pioneer Bureau and ask them to contact that person. I'll offer a deal they can't refuse."

30805.QuestDetail: The scholars were chased by Caprahorns and got lost in the labyrinth. Go help them!

20024.QuestDetail: Lisette feels like someone is following her every time she conducts geological surveys. She hopes you can check and see whether she's just overthinking...

30006.QuestDetail: Rumer says two companions went out to survey geological sites and water sources but haven't returned. He's worried about them...

30639.QuestDetail: Zemirah believes Jolon's boss sold her a defective product, but Jolon insists it's not a mechanical issue...

30007.QuestDetail: Duval, a hunter, invites you to join him in hunting a very unusual Caprahorn...

30640.QuestDetail: Leonard, a famous sketch artist who traveled all the way from Byrnhald, is resting at the Hunter Camp. He wants someone familiar with the area to guide him into the depths of the Moonshadow Wilds to find the Crimson Foxen...

30641.QuestDetail: The spread of Illusory Blooms has caused many problems for the Hunter Camp, and Orlando is quite troubled.

30806.QuestDetail: "Are these Caprahorns manifestations of the Engram anomaly in this region, or perhaps the cause of them? "

30642.QuestDetail: In the depths of the Stray Starway, there are faint Caprahorn tracks... and whose silhouette?

30008.QuestName: Cast the Line Above the Waterfall
30008.QuestDetail: Northwest of the Bekmar Transport Station is a giant waterfall where many adventurers love to fish. It just so happens Lure recently arrived on the highlands. Take him there.

30009.QuestDetail:
Sylvaine has fallen into another spell of self-doubt after catching anything once again. Pheebo is worried about her.
Ah, I've got it! Pheebo comes up with a plan, but she needs help. Can you assist her? Please, Bo.

30643.QuestDetail: Migrating Caprahorns never detour just because of trouble. Neither does this one.

30010.QuestDetail: Upon hearing Lure is on the highlands, Sylvaine wants to meet him and learn his fishing techniques...

30644.QuestDetail: Since then, I've never seen it or its herd again. Are they climbing the cliffs or traveling with the roaring winds? Who can say?

40501.QuestDetail: You received a letter. It seems a friend on the plateau is in trouble and needs your help...

50009.QuestDetail: Limited Event – Skill Reset has started! Find Milia at the Pioneer Bureau to learn about it.

40500.QuestDetail: It has been a while since you last saw the high-ranking Creed Guard Boyce. A few days ago, he sent word that he has an important request to discuss with you in person at Lallipar.

170202.QuestDetail: By a giant Illusory Bloom near the Pillar of Divinity is an artisan focused on researching their craft, Thorne. His research sustains an Illusion, and now, he has invited you to see it for yourself.

30011.QuestDetail: If we shall never meet again, I hope that when you gaze upon the moon, you will remember how we once bathed in its splendor, strolling through the woods as the night breeze blew gently against us...

50070.QuestDetail:
Clear an Illusion in Slumberdream Valley collecting at least 400 Slumberdream Remnants.
Active during the Slumberdream Valley event

50071.QuestDetail:
Clear an Illusion in Slumberdream Valley collecting at least 800 Slumberdream Remnants.
Active during the Slumberdream Valley event

30012.QuestDetail: Once Flamehorn is defeated, a Caprahorn made of Engram suddenly appears before you. Where does it want to take you? What does it want you to know?

30013.QuestName: A Day in the Life of Hawkes
30013.QuestDetail:
Chief, what should we do with these guys from the Pioneer Bureau? Take 'em all out?
"When were they captured? Why don't I remember anything about it?"
"It was when you were away on business a while back. These fools tried to sneak in."
"What?! The nerve! Keep a close eye on them. I'll be needing them soon!"
"Yes, Chief!"

50072.QuestDetail:
Clear an Illusion in Slumberdream Valley collecting at least 1200 Slumberdream Remnants.
Active during the Slumberdream Valley event

50073.QuestDetail:
Clear an Illusion in Slumberdream Valley collecting at least 1400 Slumberdream Remnants.
Active during the Slumberdream Valley event

186445.QuestName: Defeat High Priest Horrace and His Group

50074.QuestDetail:
Clear Valley of Slumbering Dreams and collect at least 1,800 Slumbering Dream Fragments in a single run.
Active during the Valley of Slumbering Dreams event

50075.QuestDetail:
Clear Valley of Slumbering Dreams and defeat Boarlet Henry in a single run.
Henry has a chance to appear in Area 4 of the Valley of Slumbering Dreams on Hard or Nightmare difficulty.
Active during the Valley of Slumbering Dreams event

50076.QuestDetail:
A rumor has suddenly started spreading among the Adventurers: a mysterious person holds clues to hidden treasure...
Active during the Slumberdream Valley event

50077.QuestDetail:
Clear an Illusion in Slumberdream Valley collecting at least 4000 Slumberdream Remnants.
Active during the Slumberdream Valley event

50078.QuestDetail:
Clear an Illusion in Slumberdream Valley collecting at least 7000 Slumberdream Remnants.
Active during the Slumberdream Valley event

50079.QuestDetail:
Clear Valley of Slumbering Dreams and collect at least 10,000 Slumbering Dream Fragments in a single run.
Active during the Valley of Slumbering Dreams event

50080.QuestDetail:
Clear an Illusion in Slumberdream Valley.

30808.QuestDetail: There's a treasure hunter looking troubled at the Sunset Wilds camp. He seems to be fretful about something...

30645.QuestDetail: The artisans at the Artisan Camp ran into a strange phenomenon during their surveying work: repeatedly measuring the same section of a wall with an ordinary ruler yielded constantly changing results. The team leader has decided not to investigate the cause for now, but rather use the methods he has on hand to determine the boundaries of the error...

30809.QuestDetail: Reilia is crying about something, her tears staining the dirt under the setting sun. Go listen to her story.

30646.QuestDetail: To verify his hypothesis, Julien designed a special experiment: using a controllable device with a constant speed to trace the boundaries of the Uncertainty Storm. However, he seems to be fretting over his inability to find a suitable device for the experiment...

30810.QuestDetail: Two rival treasure-hunting squads have simultaneously set their sights on the same treasure location and gotten into a dispute. Hurry and stop them before an accident happens!

30647.QuestName: Uninvited Guest at the Artisan Camp
30647.QuestDetail: Julien's Uncertainty Storm experiment has received high praise, but it also seems to have drawn an uninvited guest to the Artisan Camp...

30811.QuestDetail: Shalan, a panic-stricken traveling merchant, is crying out for someone to assist her. Go see what happened!

30648.QuestDetail: Ever since the contraband Crimson Marrow crystals were discovered at the Artisan Camp, the camp has fallen silent, with no more news of any commissions. Actually, it seems the priests may be the ones with a commission...

30812.QuestDetail: Two treasure hunters are fighting fiercely over clues to a treasure, and it seems to have something to do with the Divines...

30649.QuestDetail: The Pioneer Bureau made emergency contact, saying that someone from the Alchemy Camp has gone missing in the Sunken Corridor. They are in desperate need of help...

30813.QuestDetail: The ownership of a little Caprahorn has triggered a dispute...

30650.QuestDetail: The Alchemists have sent another commission. This time, they seem extremely confident...

30814.QuestDetail: A mysterious message bottle, unknown clues... Could you unearth a treasure full of Luno?

39121.QuestDetail:
Starland is now open, and it's what everyone is talking about! Miss Meowclu's happy, dreamlike island is waiting for everyone to experience.
Meowlux Merchant Guild assistants and enthusiastic tourists are glad to introduce the island's attractions to newcomers.
If you want to fully understand Starland, there's no better way than asking frequent island visitors. Their experience is an invaluable resource!
Be it how to enjoy the island's many amenities or the stories behind them, the island's denizens are more than happy to share what they know.

30651.QuestDetail: The turmoil at the Artisan Camp has temporarily subsided, but two plainclothes priests are still wandering around the Sunken Corridor, and have even sent a private commission request...

170108.QuestDetail: Milia is waiting for adventurers who crave power. Pass her trial to become a Twin Striker.

30652.QuestDetail: A girl has appeared in the Bluespine Lizard's territory, and seems to be conducting a mysterious trade with it.

30014.QuestDetail: They say it's foolish to put all your eggs in one basket. Loyalty? Honor? If human freedom is restricted by such illusory concepts, it's all over. Klaus is highly capable but too naive and weak; Reiner is skilled in his methods but narrow-minded and vindictive; Ludwig is a silent stone; and as for that meathead Konrad, well... hmph.

30015.QuestDetail: A three-person adventurer squad dropped off the map while investigating the ruins. After their commission timed out, the Pioneer Bureau realized an accident must have occurred...

30815.QuestDetail: A merchant had his goods stolen by goblins—but it seems there's more to the story than that.

30816.QuestDetail: The goblins in the west of the plateau have been causing a lot of trouble. Seems like the Pilgrim Camp has something to ask of you.

30017.QuestDetail:
"Why did you rescue me? I have nothing to offer in return."
"There's not a historian as brilliant as you in the entire Duchy. Do not waste your knowledge and abilities. Work for me, and I will provide you with sanctuary."
"I need enough freedom and ample time to continue my research, and I need a massive number of books."
"Trust me, there will be plenty of people to collect the books and materials you need. You won't have to take orders from anyone but me. You will be the investigation team's 'Consultant.'"

30654.QuestDetail: The Foxen packs of the Moonshadow Wilds possess a unique funeral ritual. When a member reaches the end of its life, the Foxen Boss places it in an open area bathed in moonlight while the other Foxen gather around. They howl at the moon to mourn the passing of their pack member. Hunters refer to this funeral ritual as the Moon Burial.

30817.QuestDetail: Clarisse urgently needs an adventurer to help her complete her final goblin research project...

30818.QuestDetail: The contract between the Caprahorns and the inhabitants of the plateau has lasted for centuries. Each side takes only what they need, and safeguards peace... But should this balance ever be broken, calamity will befall this forest, and fire will consume the sky. —The Sheep Totem, Vol. 1

30655.QuestDetail: My dual blades may be broken, but the honor and faith in my heart will never waver! For the Blackstone Legion! For Byrnhald!

170210.QuestDetail: A visitor from the Meowlux Merchant Guild is waiting for me. She's brought a mysterious invitation... Perhaps opening it will kick off an unexpected adventure.

186615.QuestName: Catch the Poachers with Your Companions

30653.QuestDetail: Adriana's sister disappeared in the Basilisk's territory, and in her despair, she has decided to seek revenge.

186451.QuestDetail: Adriana's sister disappeared in the Basilisk's territory, and in her despair, she has decided to seek revenge.

30656.QuestDetail:
He is a silent, cold black stone. A resolute executor of the Duchy's will. An imposing, reliable captain of the guard to his soldiers.
However, beneath all of these, is he truly dedicated to the Duchy's mission, or is he exercising his inner anger and resentment, using the iron curtain of the Duchy's will to "rationalize" what he inflicts upon "outsiders"?

"You'll be okay. Daddy won't let anything happen to you."
"No matter what you become, you will always be Daddy's little genius."
"You are perfect."

30023.QuestDetail:
"People always say that every time we meet is one opportunity gone."
"Don't you agree? Life is just a process of subtraction."
"No. Every time we meet, it's one more opportunity."

30025.QuestDetail:
There will always come a day when people must part ways.
That's why the time spent together should be cherished more.

30660.QuestDetail: After making contact with the Creed, the artisans claim to have found the answer to the problem. However, is that truly the case?

31121.QuestDetail: Meowflyn has prepared a deluxe Tag gift pack. Visit the House of Wonders to claim it.

30661.QuestDetail: An old lady who traveled all the way from Byrnhald for a pilgrimage in the Highlands has suddenly gone missing. Her companion is very worried. Go and see what happened.

30026.QuestDetail: A contest between two elders. Who will emerge victorious?

30662.QuestDetail: A young boy claiming to be the Chief Priest of the Creed blocks your path...

30027.QuestDetail: A scholar and a treasure hunter are arguing over a note with strange contents. Both are sticking to their guns and refusing to back down...

30831.QuestDetail: Traveling merchants have been losing goods for days. How can we catch this despicable thief?

30663.QuestDetail: A priest of the Creed has lost some classified documents and is running around in a panic.

30028.QuestDetail: Duffy, a hunter on the highlands, was accidentally injured by a fox. He is stranded and can only sit anxiously by the road...

30832.QuestName: Truth That Cannot Be Delayed: Hidden Prerequisite

30833.QuestDetail: The guard Gunther insists that the hunter Radames attacked him, but the hunter claims he's been framed and hopes someone can prove his innocence...

30664.QuestDetail: The artisan studying the Illusory Bloom suddenly fell into a hallucination and wrote a 30,000-word thesis about something that doesn't exist. What should we do...

30665.QuestDetail: A villager in Lallipar has lost a sheep and is looking for someone to help bring it back...

30834.QuestDetail: Sabine, a leader of the merchants, needs your help with a missing person case...

30029.QuestDetail: Gaston, one of the merchant leaders, has sent a commission, and it seems to involve Sabine...

50200.QuestDetail: Limited Event – Skill Reset has started! Find Milia at the Pioneer Bureau to learn about it.

30835.QuestDetail: The merchant Gaston has lost a batch of goods and wants you to help find them...

30030.QuestDetail: Introduced by Sabine, a strange man in green has also sent a commission...

30836.QuestDetail: Edred, a merchant in the same guild as Sabine, has also sent a commission. However, he looks a bit strange...

30666.QuestDetail: In the Sunset Wilds, a strange person claims to be able to contact the Fagaros through meditation...

30667.QuestDetail: Listen to what the villagers are talking about.

30031.QuestDetail: The strange man in green seems very satisfied with the last commission. This time, he has an even more bizarre request...

30668.QuestDetail: Help the mushroom fanatic find the Sunfire Mushroom of his dreams...

30669.QuestDetail: A damaged diary was found in a new area of the Sislesa Mine, recording some unspeakable secret... What exactly happened here?

30837.QuestDetail: Sabine seems to have found the traitor in the guild. What crucial step will she take next?

30670.QuestDetail: Help the miner collect fat from the stinger gland of the Infernal Arachnocrab, said to be an excellent material for lamp oil.

30671.QuestDetail: A scholar studying Arachnocrab ecology has appeared deep in the mine... How is this even possible?

30838.QuestDetail: Artisan Elana is recruiting assistants for underground mine exploration and is hoping experienced adventurers will come to help.

30033.QuestDetail:
"This peak is fifty percent higher than the average. Strange, is the monitor malfunctioning again?" Evelyn stared at the compiled data, scratching her head in confusion.
"Beep—boop—"
"Alright, alright, I believe you." She murmured to the noisy Engram Monitor, as if soothing a restless coworker.
"But an anomaly in Engram flow of this magnitude... Could it be from the underground ruins?"

30673.QuestDetail: Their bodies are connected to this woodland.

30839.QuestDetail: The water detector placed last time has finished collecting data. Artisan Elana hopes for your assistance in retrieving the device...
